name: Agrimoniin
description: Agrimoniin is an ellagitannin studied for redox and inflammatory pathway effects in preclinical models. Human clinical evidence is limited.
effects: Preclinical reviews report antioxidant and inflammation-modulating activity across experimental systems.
Human clinical efficacy data remain limited.
contraindications: Insufficient high-quality human safety data for high-dose supplementation.
interactions: Interaction profile is not well characterized in clinical studies.

sources.title: Safety signals and interaction liabilities of dietary flavonoids: systematic review and meta-analysis.

summary: Agrimoniin is an ellagitannin studied for redox and inflammatory pathway effects in preclinical models. Human clinical evidence is limited.
